examples.title: Complete Block Implementation
examples.description: Full block structure with header and body
examples.explanation: A complete block contains an index, previous hash, list of transactions, timestamp, nonce, and its own hash. The Merkle root summarizes all transactions efficiently.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n log n) for Merkle root

examples.title: Chain Integrity Validation
examples.description: Verify the integrity of an entire blockchain
examples.explanation: Chain validation checks two things for each block: (1) the hash matches the calculated hash, and (2) the previous_hash points to the actual previous block's hash.

examples.title: Creating a Genesis Block
examples.description: Genesis block creation with special handling
examples.code:
def create_genesis_block() -> Block:
    """
    Create the genesis block - the first block in the chain.
    
    Genesis block characteristics:
    - Index: 0
    - Previous hash: All zeros (no previous block)
    - Fixed/known timestamp
    - May contain special message or parameters
    """
    genesis_message = "Genesis Block - Network Initialized"
    
    genesis_tx = Transaction(
        sender="NETWORK",
        receiver="NETWORK",
        amount=0,
        signature=genesis_message
    )
    
    genesis = Block(
        index=0,
        previous_hash="0" * 64,  # 64 zeros
        transactions=[genesis_tx],
        timestamp=1231006505,  # Bitcoin genesis timestamp
        nonce=0
    )
    
    print(f"Genesis Block Created")
    print(f"Hash: {genesis.hash}")
    print(f"Previous: {genesis.previous_hash}")
    return genesis

# Create and display
genesis = create_genesis_block()
examples.explanation: The genesis block is special - it has no previous block, so previous_hash is set to zeros. It establishes the starting point of the blockchain.

examples.title: JavaScript Block Implementation
examples.explanation: This JavaScript implementation includes a simple mining function that finds a hash with a specified number of leading zeros by incrementing the nonce.
